mapper.insert: insert into pf_training_camp(name, venue, start_date, end_date, head_coach_id, program_type, create_time, update_time) values(#{name}, #{venue}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{headCoachId}, #{programType}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update pf_training_camp set name = #{name}, venue = #{venue}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, head_coach_id = #{headCoachId}, program_type = #{programType}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select ptc.*, ps.name as headCoachName, case when DATE(NOW()) < DATE(ptc.start_date) THEN '招募中' when DATE(NOW()) > DATE(ptc.end_date) THEN '已结束' ELSE '进行中' END as status from pf_training_camp ptc left join pf_staff ps on ps.id = ptc.head_coach_id
ptc.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and ptc.start_date between #{begin} and #{end}
order by ptc.update_time desc
